title: Guided Launch Brief
concept: A wizard-first Playground redesign for agency developers, where creating a client test site is framed as a five-step launch brief and saved Playgrounds, Site Manager tools, gallery browsing, saving, import, and export remain available as secondary task modes.
focus: monochrome interface with colored status chips
secondary saved and manager task modes
flows: Start from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, featured blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery
Confirm runtime settings for WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, multisite, and reset or reload behavior
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible copy progress
Browse saved and unsaved Playgrounds, then rename, delete, or resume browser-backed entries
Use Site Manager tools for settings, file browsing and editing, blueprint editing, database tools, logs, exports, and downloads
Navigate the active embedded WordPress site with path input, refresh, Homepage, and WP Admin shortcuts
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
